query: How do I reset my password?
ideal_answer: To reset your password, go to the settings page and click 'Reset Password'. You will receive an email with instructions.

query: How do I upgrade my account?
ideal_answer: Go to Account Settings > Billing > Upgrade Plan. Choose your desired plan and complete the payment.
